name: Creamy First-Down Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 Can Eagle Brand Sweetened Condensed Milk (14 oz -- NOT evaporated milk)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a 9-inch square pan with aluminum foil.
3. Combine the graham cracker crumbs, sugar, and melted margarine; press firmly onto the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 8 minutes.
5. Cool completely.
6. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt the Hershey's Chocolate Chips, Eagle Brand sweetened condensed milk, and vanilla extract.
7. Remove from heat and stir in the softened cream cheese until well blended.
8. Stir in the chopped nuts.
9. Spread mixture over the prepared crust.
10. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
11. Lift fudge from the pan onto a cutting board; peel off the foil and cut into squares.
12. Store covered in the refrigerator.
Prep time: 15 minutes.
